subcodes.first_line: O thou who gazest upon the Countenance! There hath befallen thee that which befell the Self of Truth, whereat the heavens wept [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها الناظر الی الوجه وارد شد بر شما آنچه بر نفس حق وارد شد آسمان گریست و
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @chastisement and requital, @recompense; reward for belief; right action, @high station of the true believer, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @consolation and comfort
